method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile (0.71), good age similarity (0.39), good kms (0.57), but zero purpose match and weak route similarity (0.036). Statistical 0.523 is appropriate.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); age similarity 0.39 is the highest in this group but insufficient to overcome purpose divergence.

1311.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile (-0.20), excellent kms (0.80), weak route similarity (0.059), zero purpose match. Antagonistic zone patterns despite high kms similarity. Adjust up slightly from 0.126 due to kms strength.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: kms similarity 0.80 suggests same operational scale, but zone antagonism indicates fundamentally different routes.

1312.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile (0.71), excellent kms (0.80), perfect duty-cycle, but zero purpose match and very weak route similarity (0.029). Adjust down slightly from 0.530 due to purpose mismatch.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.029 is very weak; distinct route clusters.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) limits scenario applicability despite strong operational metrics.

1350.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile (0.57), perfect purpose/duty match, good kms similarity (0.66). Route similarity weak (0.046). Statistical score of 0.581 is appropriate.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.046 suggests distinct route clusters despite behavioral overlap.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty-cycle both 1.0; kms similarity 0.66 indicates comparable operational scale.

1363.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile (0.64), weak kms (0.24), weak route similarity (0.036), zero purpose match. Lower kms and weak route profile justify lower total score.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Weak kms (0.24) and purpose mismatch indicate low operational similarity.

1421.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile (0.49), perfect purpose/duty match, excellent kms similarity (0.68), but weak route similarity (0.045). Statistical 0.547 is reasonable.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Perfect purpose and duty-cycle; kms 0.68 suggests similar operational distance.

1423.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile (-0.20), good kms (0.78), weak route similarity (0.061), zero purpose match. Zone antagonism dominant despite kms strength.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: kms similarity 0.78 but zone antagonism indicates opposite route directions or service areas.

1506.llm_rationale: Zero stop-profile, zero duty-cycle match (critical), weak route similarity (0.191), zero purpose match. Duty-cycle mismatch indicates fundamentally different operational patterns.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.191 is weak to moderate but insufficient.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Zero duty-cycle match is a red flag; trucks operate under different schedules or intensity patterns.

1575.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile (0.65), exceptional kms similarity (0.97), perfect duty-cycle, but zero purpose match and weak route similarity (0.034). Kms strength partially offset by purpose mismatch.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: kms similarity 0.97 is exceptional, but purpose mismatch (0.0) limits transferability.

1576.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile and duty-cycle match (both 1.0 purpose and duty), good kms similarity (0.51), but route similarity is very weak (0.048). Statistical score of 0.594 is appropriate.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.63 indicates moderate-to-good alignment in zone-pass patterns across weekday/weekend.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.048 is very weak; trucks operate in different route clusters despite shared zones.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Perfect purpose and duty-cycle match (1.0 each) and age similarity (0.28) support behavioral similarity despite route divergence.

1578.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile (0.68), excellent kms (0.82), perfect duty-cycle, but zero purpose match and very weak route similarity (0.025). Purpose mismatch limits scenario fit.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0); kms similarity 0.82 is strong but offset by purpose divergence.

1667.llm_rationale: Zero stop-profile (no zone overlap), weak route similarity (0.073), zero purpose match, weak kms (0.54). Statistical 0.193 is appropriate; no basis for scenario transfer.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Zero purpose match and no zone overlap indicate completely separate operational profiles.

1687.llm_rationale: Weak stop-profile (0.45), weak kms (0.31), weak route similarity (0.083), zero purpose match. Statistical 0.383 appropriately reflects low overall similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Weak across all operational dimensions; different use cases.

1688.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation (-0.12) indicates opposing zone-pass patterns. Perfect purpose/duty match cannot overcome behavioral divergence. Adjust up slightly from 0.252 due to purpose match providing some scenario overlap, but remain conservative.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: -0.12 indicates trucks operate in opposite zone profiles; likely serving different directions or service times.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty-cycle match (1.0 each) suggest same truck type, but zone antagonism indicates different operational patterns within same category.

1785.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile (-0.17) indicates opposing zone patterns. Perfect purpose/duty and moderate kms (0.52) cannot offset behavioral antagonism. Adjust down from 0.234.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: -0.17 indicates opposing zone-pass profiles; trucks serve different areas or times.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose/duty but contradictory zone behavior suggests different route assignments despite similar truck type.

1993.llm_rationale: Very strong stop-profile (0.86) and duty-cycle match (1.0) partially offset by zero purpose match and weak kms (0.37). Adjust down slightly from 0.562 due to purpose mismatch limiting scenario compatibility.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: 0.86 is high; trucks share zone-pass patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch (0.0) is significant; despite zone similarity, different truck types limit behavioral transferability.

2191.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile (0.63), excellent kms (0.82), but zero purpose match and weak route similarity (0.035). Statistical 0.490 reflects appropriate weighting.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch despite strong kms similarity; different truck types.

2201.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile (0.74), weak kms (0.33), weak route similarity (0.082), zero purpose match. Statistical 0.509 is acceptable; adjust slightly up due to stronger stop-profile.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: 0.082 is weak but highest in lower-correlation group.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch and low kms similarity indicate distinct operational profiles.

2518.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile (0.74), weak kms (0.39), weak route similarity (0.034), zero purpose match. Statistical 0.505 is appropriate.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch and weak kms limit scenario applicability.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
